Skip to content
inertia-deno

Appearance

inertia-denoInertia.js for Deno

Build server-driven SPAs with Hono, Oak or std/http — no API layer needed.

Get started
View on JSR
🦕

Deno-native

Published on JSR. Uses only standard Web API primitives — Request, Response, URLPattern. No Node.js required at runtime.

⚡

Any router

Works with Hono, Oak, std/http, or the built-in micro-router. Adapters included for Hono and Oak.

🔀

Inertia v1 + v2

Full support for lazy props, deferred props, merge props and history encryption.

🛠️

CLI included

Scaffold a new project with one command. Choose Vue 3 or React 18, pick your router, and start coding.
